nasb.text: But when he was approaching the age of forty, it entered his mind to visit his brethren, the sons of Israel.

esv.text: “When he was forty years old, it came into his heart to visit his brothers, the children of Israel.

cnv.text: “到了四十歲，他心中起了一個念頭，要去看望自己的同胞以色列人。

ccb.text: 他四十岁那年决定去探望自己的同胞以色列人。

csbs.text: “当他满四十岁的时候，心里决定要去探望自己的同胞以色列子民。
